content:
Building fire protection design software: scientific planning of secure systems

Fire protection design is the core guarantee of building security. From sprinkler systems to alarm systems, from evacuation design to fire zoning, fire protection design software helps engineers scientifically design building fire protection systems. This article will comprehensively evaluate mainstream building fire protection design software to help fire protection engineers master the digitalization design tools of secure systems.

Fire protection equipment Corevalue of planning software

Fire protection design software assumes key functions in architectural design:

  • Sprinkler design: automatic sprinkler system design
  • Alarm system: fire alarm system design
  • Evacuation design: evacuation path and width calculation
  • Fire protection calculation: fire load and flow calculation
  • Code verification: automatic verification of fire code

In-depth Review: Mainstream fire protection design software

FireCAD: Professional design tool for fire protection systems

FireCAD is a professional software for fire protection system design and calculation.

Core Features:

  • Automatic sprinkler system design
  • Firefighting hydraulic calculation
  • Pipe size calculation
  • Firefighting equipment selection
  • Detailed report generation

Sprinkler design:

Coreadvantages of FireCAD is a sprinkler system Sprinkler design. The software can accurately design automatic sprinkler systems and calculate hydraulic parameters.

Accurate calculation:

FireCAD's fire hydraulic calculation is accurate and meets the needs of professional fire design.

HydraCAD: Sprinkler system calculation tool

HydraCAD is a professional software for hydraulic calculation of sprinkler systems.

Core Features:

  • Hydraulic calculation of sprinkler system
  • Pipeline network analysis
  • Flow and pressure calculation
  • Equipment selection suggestions
  • Calculation report generation

Hydraulic calculation:

HydraCAD's Coreadvantages is a hydraulic calculation. The software's hydraulic calculation of sprinkler systems is professional and accurate.

Pipeline analysis:

HydraCAD can perform pipeline network analysis and optimize sprinkler system design.

Revit Fire Protection: BIM fire design tool

Revit Fire Protection is the fire design module of the Autodesk Revit platform.

Core Features:

  • BIM fire protection system modeling
  • Three-dimensional design of sprinkler pipes
  • Fire protection equipment family library
  • Collision detection
  • Construction drawing generation

BIMadvantages:

Revit Fire Protection's Corevantages is BIMintegration. Fire protection design is integrated into the building BIM model and collaborates with other systems of the building.

Three-dimensional design:

RevitSupported three-dimensional design of sprinkler pipes and intuitive layout of fire protection systems.

Prediction of development trend of fire protection design software

Intelligent fire design

AI will assist fire protection design. AI can automatically design fire protection systems and optimize sprinkler layouts based on building characteristics. Design efficiency will be improved.

BIM fire protection deepens

Fire protection design will be deeply integrated into BIM collaboration. The fire protection system will be coordinated with other systems in the building to discover design conflicts and optimize system layout.

Evacuation simulation integration

Fire protection design software will integrate evacuation simulation function. Designers can simulate the fire evacuation process and optimize the evacuation design.

Automatic verification of specifications

The automatic verification function of fire regulations will be more improved. The software can automatically check the compliance of fire protection design and generate compliance reports.< /p>

Purchase Suggestions

When choosing fire protection design software, it is recommended to consider:

  • Sprinkler requirements: Professional sprinkler design requires professional tools such as FireCAD
  • BIMapplications: BIM projects are suitable for Revit Fire Protection
  • Hydraulic calculation: Accurate hydraulic calculation requires professional calculation software
  • Alarm requirements: Fire alarm design requires alarm design function
  • Budget considerations: Evaluate software cost and training investment

Fire protection design software is a digitalization design tool for secure systems. Choose appropriate fire design software to scientifically design building fire protection systems.
